FIGHT STRATEGY - Slaver
FIGHT TYPE: Hallway (full block)
WIN CONDITION: Stance dance burst. Setup in Calm, burst in Wrath.
ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Block with Defends, Vigilance for Calm entry and block.
KEY CARDS: Eruption (Wrath entry from Calm for +2E), Vigilance (Calm entry + block), Talk to the Hand (Block Return), Tranquility (Calm exit for Wrath)
POTION PLAN: Save potions for elite. Essence of Steel if needed.
RISKS: Only 1 Eruption for Wrath entry. Need to draw it with an exit.

TURN 1 PLAN:
Hand: Miracle, Vigilance, Strike, Tranquility, Defend, Defend
Slaver intent unknown (DEBUG). Assume attack ~13.
Path A: Vigilance (5 block + Calm) + Defend + Defend = 15 block. Blocks ~13 attack. Strike for 6 damage. Cost: 2+1+1+1 = 5E, need Miracle for energy. Vigilance(2E) + Strike(1E) = 3E exactly without Miracle. Or Vigil + 2x Defend = 4E, need Miracle.
Path B: Strike + 2x Defend = 3E for 6 damage + 10 block. Not enough if attack > 10.
Path C: Vigilance + Defend + Strike = 2+1+1 = 4E. Need Miracle. Gets 5+5=10 block + 6 damage. Enters Calm.

Best plan: Play Miracle for energy, then Vigilance (enters Calm, 5 block) + Defend + Defend + Strike = 2+1+1+1 = 5E with Miracle giving +1 = 4E total... wait, Miracle gives 1 energy. So 3+1 = 4E.
Vigilance (2E) + Defend (1E) + Strike (1E) = 4E. With Miracle thats exactly 4E.
Block = 5 + 5 = 10. Damage = 6.
Or: Vigilance (2E) + 2x Defend (2E) = 4E with Miracle. Block = 5+5+5 = 15. No damage but safe.

Lets go defensive: Miracle + Vigilance + 2x Defend = 15 block, enter Calm. Next turn exit Calm for +2E = 5E, draw Eruption hopefully for Wrath burst.

FIGHT STRATEGY - Lagavulin (ELITE)
FIGHT TYPE: Hard-scaler (kill speed matters - debuffs Str/Dex every 2 turns)
WIN CONDITION: Wrath burst. Need to kill fast before debuffs stack.

Lagavulin: 111 HP, Metallicize 8 (gains 8 block each turn), starts asleep for 3 turns.
When awake: attacks for ~18-20, applies -1 Str/-1 Dex every other turn.

FREE TURNS: Lagavulin sleeps for 3 turns. I should NOT attack (attacking wakes it up).
I should use these turns to:
1. Use Blessing of the Forge potion to upgrade a card
2. Set up Calm stance
3. Draw through deck to get good hand

BUT WAIT: Lagavulin has 8 Metallicize. If I dont deal damage during sleep turns, it gains 8 block per turn. After 3 turns thats 24 block... but block resets each turn I think. No, Metallicize gives block at END of turn. So Lagavulin always starts with 8 block.

Actual plan: I need to burst through 111 HP + 8 block per turn. With my small deck, I need multiple Wrath burst turns.

My deck: 3 Strikes, 4 Defends, Eruption, Vigilance, Tranquility, Talk to the Hand = 11 cards.
Damage per Wrath burst cycle: Eruption (9*2=18) + 3 Strikes (6*2*3=36) = 54, but thats if I draw all of them. Plus Talk to Hand (7*2=14).

Use Blessing of Forge NOW - if it upgrades Eruption to 1E, thats huge.
Use Essence of Steel for 4 Plated Armor - good sustained block.

Turn 1 (free): Use Blessing of Forge. Play Vigilance (enter Calm, 5 block). End turn. Save energy for future.
Turn 2 (free): Setup more.
Turn 3 (free): Setup, prepare for Wrath burst on turn 4 when Lag wakes up.
Turn 4+: Wrath burst.
